expense.title: Expense
expense.description: An expense item representing a transaction logged by a user.

userId.description: The Firebase Authentication UID of the owner.

title.description: Short title or merchant name describing the transaction.

amount.description: Positive monetary value formatted in local currency (Rupees).

category.description: The category classification of the expense.

date.description: The local calendar date when the expense was incurred (YYYY-MM-DD).

/expenses/{expenseId}.description: Collection storing all user transaction expenses globally, secured at the query layer by userId.
